articles.title: Real Madrid sign Cucurella from Chelsea in first transfer since Mourinho's return

articles.title: 8th Pay Commission: Stakeholders seek gratuity ceiling hike to ₹75 lakh, revised payout formula; check details
articles.excerpt: Today marks the final day for stakeholders to submit their memorandum to the 8th Pay Commission. Major proposals include increasing gratuity payouts to ₹75 lakh and a revised calculation formula for government employees.
articles.content: Today marks the final day for stakeholders to submit their memorandum to the 8th Pay Commission. Major proposals include increasing gratuity payouts to ₹75 lakh and a revised calculation formula for government employees.
articles.author: Shivam Shukla
